basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 05 June 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Rishikesh. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Rishikesh Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Cognitive Sciences, Psychology, Physiology, Neurosciences with first division, Qualification in CSIR-UGC NET and GATE (desirable), Experience in research involving experimental psychophysics/psychology, cognitive testing, and electro-encephalography (EEG), Programming/Building psychophysical experiments, Application of statistical techniques for the analysis of data
qualification.details: Full-time Junior Research Fellow: Master's degree in Cognitive Sciences, Psychology, Physiology, Neurosciences with first division (essential). Qualification in CSIR-UGC NET and GATE (desirable). Experience in research involving experimental psychophysics/psychology, cognitive testing, and electro-encephalography (EEG); data analyses and interpretation (will be preferred). Programming/Building psychophysical experiments (essential). Application of statistical techniques for the analysis of data (essential).

selection_process: Written test/ Interview or both Scrutiny by screening committee Possible written/skill test or merit-based screening
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Rishikesh to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Rishikesh Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at AIIMS Rishikesh is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application is completed before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Cognitive Sciences, Psychology, Physiology, or Neurosciences with a first division. A qualification in CSIR-UGC NET and GATE is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Full-time Junior Research Fellow position at AIIMS Rishikesh.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for AIIMS Rishikesh Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve a written test, an interview, or both. A scrutiny by a screening committee and a possible written/skill test or merit-based screening are also part of the process.

faq.question: Q7. Where is AIIMS Rishikesh located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Rishikesh is located in Rishikesh, Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Specific age limits are not detailed in the provided summary. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for precise age criteria and any applicable relaxations.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of AIIMS Rishikesh or via the provided application link before the last date of 25th June 2026.
